response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced generalist with 15+ years across web, mobile, and embedded work, and his low-latency distributed-systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic plus recent AI-agent tooling at re:cinq are genuine assets. However, this is a Principal (IC6) role centered on experimentation and growth systems, and the resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry, or metrics-infrastructure experience, nor evidence of principal-level scope such as architecting systems adopted across multiple teams at enterprise scale. His career has been senior-level IC work at small-to-mid companies, and his strongest languages (TypeScript, DLang) sit mostly outside the listed core stack. The gap to the role's core specialization and level is too large to recommend an interview.
strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Real high-scale distributed-systems experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks), matching the preferred AI-velocity qualification
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core focus of the role
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no evidence of leading multi-team initiatives or building platforms adopted across an enterprise
Primary language depth is in TypeScript/Node and DLang; C/C++/C#/Java exposure is limited or dated relative to the required stack
